props.baseColor: Sets the color of the input when it is not focused.
props.centerAffix: Vertically align **appendInner**, **prependInner**, **clearIcon** and **label** in the center.
props.direction: Changes the direction of the input.
props.hideDetails: Hides hint and validation errors. When set to `auto` messages will be rendered only if there's a message (hint, error message, counter value etc) to display.
props.hideSpinButtons: Hides spin buttons on the input when type is set to `number`.
props.glow: Makes prepend/append icons full opacity when the input is focused and apply color.
props.hint: Displays hint text below the input when focused. Force this always open with the [persistent-hint](#props-persistent-hint) property.
props.iconColor: Sets the color of the prepend/append icons.
props.id: Sets the DOM id on the component.
props.indentDetails: Adds / removes inline padding in inputs details. Useful when trying to align different variants of fields and selection controls.
props.prependIcon: Prepends an icon to the component, uses the same syntax as `v-icon`.

events.click:append: Emitted when appended icon is clicked.
events.click:prepend: Emitted when prepended icon is clicked.

exposed.errorMessages: An array of error messages that were set by the `setErrors` method.
exposed.isValid: Boolean indicating if the input is valid.
exposed.resetValidation: Resets validation of the input without modifying its value.
